last_action.outcome: M2.1 — Application Shell Foundation delivered. Two layouts (AppLayout, AppEmptyLayout), two placeholder shell components (AppSidebarSlot, AppTopBarSlot), one presentational helper (AppShellRegion), the M1.1 chrome migration, four bUnit test files (25 new tests, 102 total component tests passing), the Tailwind content path update to include Layouts/, the Layouts/_Imports.razor, the wrap of /design-system and /not-found in AppEmptyLayout, and the Routes.razor DefaultLayout change to AppLayout. The M1.2 components and tests are preserved. Branch: feature/m2-1-application-shell. Commit: feat(m2.1): add application shell foundation. Push skipped (no remote configured). Project-continuity state updated per Rule 15. T-001 (M2.1) marked Done; T-002 (M2.2) promoted to Ready; M2.2 plan expanded to Awaiting Approval.

intended_next_action: The next session reads the M2.2 plan (.ai/plans/M2.2-navigation-registry-sidebar.md) and either approves it (and starts M2.2 implementation) or amends it and re-submits. The Progressive Coding Rule applies: one task per session, 13-step lifecycle, stop after the coherent commit. M2.2 implementation is NOT started in this session.
session_notes: M2.1 — Application Shell Foundation closeout session. The revised M2.1 plan was approved 2026-07-11 and implementation followed § 16 (15-step order). The 5 new components (2 layouts + 2 placeholder shell components + 1 presentational helper) ship with 25 new bUnit tests. The M1.1 chrome is removed. The Tailwind content path includes the new Layouts/ directory. The /design-system and /not-found pages wrap in AppEmptyLayout. The visual smoke test confirms all five M1 routes return 200 and the new shell structure renders correctly with the data-app-region attributes. Per AGENTS.md Rule 15 (project continuity) and Rule 17 (evidence of completion), the session produced the implementation report, updated the state and handoff files, and produced the closeout commit. The session promotes T-002 (M2.2) to Ready and expands the M2.2 plan stub to a full plan in Awaiting Approval. The session does NOT implement M2.2 (per the Progressive Coding Rule).
